figures.caption: Table 1: Performance of ss–gcr(1), ss–mr, and lr-pgmres for the convectiondiffusion problem preconditioned by (7.2) with tol = 10−6, maxit = 50, and toltrank = 10−10. Two-sided sketching is required in all cases. ‘*’ means the method did not converge to the prescribed tolerance within 50 iterations.

Table 3: Test Problem 1 Performance of ss–mr on the matrix equation formulation with one-term preconditioning, and minres on the associated linear system with the same preconditioner, tol = 10−6 and toltrank = 10−8.

Table 5: Test Problem 2 Performance of ss–mr on the matrix equation formulation with one-term preconditioning, and minres on the associated linear system with the same preconditioner, tol = 10−6 and toltrank = 10−8.
